calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Worth, via Zoom, for Raymonde Kramlich and Kira Kramlich, Petitioners.

Mr. Worth offers advocacy for his client's petition. The court confirms that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated May-15-2014 is admitted to probate. Raymonde S. Kramlich and Kira E. Kramlich are appointed co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jun-07-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Continued To May-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
